Community Voices

Experiences from our students in Jaipur.

★★★★★

"I had an amazing experience learning yoga with Namrata Di. She is highly knowledgeable, patient, and always motivates everyone to give their best. Every session is well-planned, easy to follow, and leaves me feeling refreshed and energized. Her guidance has helped improve my flexibility, posture, and overall fitness."

— Neha Jain

★★★★★

"I had a wonderful experience in the yoga class conducted by Namrata Ma'am. Her teaching style is calm, clear, and encouraging, making every session enjoyable and easy to follow. She pays attention to each participant's posture and motivates everyone to practice with confidence."

— Shilpa Sharma

★★★★★

"I've been taking yoga classes for the past 2.5 months, and I'm really impressed with the progress I've made, especially improvement in my health. Amazing place, incredible energy, wonderful people, great positivity, well planned sessions, flexible timing, and a well trained guide."

— Jyoti Jain

★★★★★

"Namrta ma'am is an amazing yoga instructor. Her calm teaching style, expertise, and personal attention make every session enjoyable and effective. I highly recommend her classes to anyone looking to improve their health and fitness."

— Anushree Jain

★★★★★

"The yoga class is very nice and relaxing. Ma'am is very supportive, friendly, and teaches with patience. I feel fresh and positive after every session."

— Vasundhara Banthia

★★★★★

"Fantastic first Zumba session with Namrita! I absolutely loved it — high-energy standing routines and great mat work on the floor. Namrita's energy, instructions, and music choices made it easy to follow and so much fun."

— Malvika Sanghi

Let's MoveOn Yoga

Complete body and mind wellness with Namrata Jain in Jaipur, Rajasthan.
